evals.prompt: 我要评估 multimodalinput 变更的 RAM/ROM 影响。已有基线和当前 libmmi .so，请给出必须采集的数据、报告结构和可比性注意点。
evals.expected_output: Produces a three-pillar RAM/ROM measurement workflow with ROM section analysis, real-device memory capture, theoretical heap analysis, and comparability gates.
expectations: The response requires ROM file-level and readelf section-level comparison.
The response requires smaps_rollup, per-library smaps PSS, and hidumper --mem capture when RAM measurement is needed.
The response requires code-level theoretical analysis for new containers, heap objects, lazy allocation, and cleanup paths.
The response includes libmmi-client.z.so in ROM/code impact analysis and only excludes it from server RAM after proving it is not loaded by the server process.
If client API or proxy code is affected, the response selects a client process or test binary for client-side RAM capture.
The response records baseline/current provenance and warns when idle baseline is compared with post-exercise current data.
The response distinguishes process-level PSS context from feature RAM cost when capture conditions differ.

evals.prompt: 我要临时替换 DAYU200 上的 libmmi-server.z.so 采集基线和修改版内存。请说明安全步骤和最终还原要求。
evals.expected_output: Treats system library replacement, rw remount, and reboot as explicit-approval device operations and requires backup/restore.
expectations: The response obtains explicit approval before remounting, replacing system libraries, or rebooting the device.
The response backs up every replaced .so before deployment.
The response restores the original or requested final .so state before ending the workflow.
The response uses `mount -o rw,remount /` for RK3568 instead of `/system`.
The response uses single-shell pidof substitution or equivalent to avoid PID changes between commands.

evals.prompt: smaps 解析 libmmi PSS 时，我看到 anonymous mapping 的 PSS 被算进上一个 libmmi 库，导致结果暴涨。应该怎么修？
evals.expected_output: Explains that the parser must reset current library state on every mapping header and only count PSS for headers that actually map libmmi .so files.
expectations: The response identifies stale current_lib state as the root cause.
The response resets the current library on every smaps mapping header.
The response counts PSS only while current_lib refers to a libmmi .so mapping.
The response warns that this bug can severely overestimate per-library PSS.

evals.prompt: 这次 MMI 改动同时修改了 libmmi-client.z.so 的 proxy API 和服务端 handler。只看 multimodalinput 进程的 smaps 是否足够？
evals.expected_output: Rejects server-only RAM analysis for client-side changes and requires separate client library/code impact handling.
expectations: The response says server smaps is insufficient for libmmi-client.z.so RAM impact.
The response still includes libmmi-client.z.so in ROM and section-size analysis.
The response requires choosing a client process or test binary that loads libmmi-client.z.so and executes the affected API path.
The response reports server and client RAM conclusions separately instead of merging them into one server PSS number.
